structure.name: app/main.py
structure.content: import typer; app = typer.Typer(); @app.command() def main(user_id: str = typer.Argument(..., help='The unique identifier for the user')): typer.echo(f'Processing ID: {user_id}'); if __name__ == '__main__': app()

structure.name: app/models_inspector.py
structure.content: from typer.models import ArgumentInfo; def inspect_arg_info(obj: ArgumentInfo): print(f'Default: {obj.default}'); print(f'Help: {obj.help}'); if __name__ == '__main__': info = ArgumentInfo(default='example', help='A sample help text'); inspect_arg_info(info)
